ogTitle: Murrabit West vs Murray-Sunset: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Murrabit West and Murray-Sunset.
heading: Murrabit West vs Murray-Sunset — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Murrabit West, Victoria and Murray-Sunset, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Murrabit West has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Murray-Sunset (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Murrabit West or Murray-Sunset safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Murrabit West has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Murray-Sunset scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Murrabit West scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Murray-Sunset scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Murrabit West or Murray-Sunset?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Murrabit West has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.92% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
